# Robustness Operating Models  {#sec-oms-robustness}

```{r}
#| include: false
library(MSEtool)
library(ggplot2)
rnorm(5)
```

::: {.callout-note}

Robustness OMs have not yet been developed for SALB.

Robustness OMs will be discussed by the SALB MSE Working Group and this chapter will be updated once those models have been defined.

:::

At the 2026 Stock Assessment, the Group identified the following uncertainties 
that should be evaluated in the MSE:

- alternative CPUE configurations 
- alternative biological hypotheses

Additional uncertainties that could be evaluated in robustness OMs include:

- uncertainty in TAC implementation (e.g., overages in TAC)
- impacts of climate change (e.g., time-varying life-history parameters)
- alternative recruitment scenarios.
